pr.title: gr cleanup, internal ID fixes/additions, part 1
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Broad ground/stage cleanup PR that renamed many gr callback functions from address/UnkStage-style names to callback-table-derived names, corrected and completed InternalStageId usage, and changed StageData's first field from a misleading flags field to internal_stage_id. It also synchronized those IDs through StageData initializers and mpLib's stage table, moved grHeal static data out of a deleted static header into grheal.c, and produced one new match in gricemt.
what_changed: Renamed many ground/stage lifecycle and callback functions based on StageData callback table positions, for example Ground_801C1074 to Ground_DemoInit, grBattle_UnkStage0_OnLoad/OnStart to grBattle_OnLoad/OnStart, and grStadium_801D50B8/801D50C0 to grStadium_OnTouchLine/OnCheckShadowRender.

Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt and scratches.txt to reflect the new function names, including grFigureGet_OnInit and many gr* OnDemoInit/OnInit/OnLoad/OnStart/OnTouchLine/OnCheckShadowRender symbols.
Changed StageData in src/melee/gr/types.h so the first field is named internal_stage_id instead of flags1, and renamed callback0/callback1 fields to OnInit and OnDemoInit.

Replaced many numeric, bitmask-looking, or unknown StageData first-field initializers with InternalStageId enum values such as BATTLE, CASTLE, FIGURE1, FIGUREGET, FLATZONE, FOURSIDE, GARDEN, GREATBAY, IZUMI, KRAID, LAST, MUTECITY, PSTADIUM, SHRINE, SHRINEROUTE, STORY, TEST, YORSTER, HEAL, and target-test stages.

Expanded src/melee/gr/forward.h InternalStageId enum: InternalStageID_Unk01 became TEST; route and special IDs such as KINOKOROUTE, ZEBESROUTE, BIGBLUEROUTE, BATTLE, LAST, FIGUREGET, PUSHON, target-test stages, HEAL, FIGURE1, FIGURE2, and FIGURE3 were added or named.
Updated mpLib_803BF248 in src/melee/mp/mplib.c to use named InternalStageId enum constants instead of STAGEKIND_UNKxx and raw hex values.
Corrected users of the route ID in camera.c from SHRINEROUTE to KINOKOROUTE for stage floor height / camera eye bound logic.
Changed Kongo test-stage checks from InternalStageID_Unk01 to TEST.
Deleted src/melee/gr/grheal.static.h and inlined its grHeal callback/static stage data into src/melee/gr/grheal.c with HEAL as the StageData internal stage ID.
Completed grIceMt_801F8A34 enough for a new match by adding initialization of gp->gv.icemt2.xC4 to 0.0f and gp->x11_flags.b012 to 2, according to the bot report.
smart_moves: Used the callback-table slot order to assign semantically meaningful callback names, avoiding speculative behavior names while still improving searchability and consistency.
Fixed the StageData field name first, then propagated named enum values into many stage initializers; this prevents future contributors from continuing to treat internal_stage_id as a flags bitfield.
Kept enum constants in the same table/order context as the underlying IDs instead of scattering raw numeric values, making mpLib and StageData cross-checkable.
Updated symbols/config alongside source renames, preserving decomp tooling consistency.
Removed a grheal.static.h include-only static data header by placing the static data in the owning .c file, reducing header leakage and making the compilation unit easier to reason about.
Preserved exact diagnostic line-number behavior in grIzumi cleanup by using __FILE__ with explicit numeric line values rather than keeping awkward string-literal file names and scratch comments.
decomp_lessons: When a struct field's true role is known, rename the type field before doing wide initializer cleanup; this PR's flags1 to internal_stage_id change explains why many old bitmask-looking initializers were wrong.

Callback-table-derived names like OnInit, OnDemoInit, OnLoad, OnStart, OnTouchLine, and OnCheckShadowRender are useful safe names for stage work because they encode table position without overclaiming implementation details.
Do not leave internal stage IDs as raw values or fake flags when an enum name is available; synchronize StageData, mpLib tables, and system call sites together.
Route stages need careful distinction: this PR corrected camera route handling to KINOKOROUTE where SHRINEROUTE had been used.
A small missing field initialization can be the last blocker for a match; grIceMt_801F8A34 matched after adding gv.icemt2.xC4 and x11_flags.b012 setup.
Static data headers are a cleanup smell when only one C file owns the data; moving static arrays/StageData into the C file can simplify declarations without changing behavior.
naming_conventions: Stage lifecycle callbacks use gr<Stage>_OnDemoInit, gr<Stage>_OnInit, gr<Stage>_OnLoad, and gr<Stage>_OnStart.
Collision/render callbacks use gr<Stage>_OnTouchLine and gr<Stage>_OnCheckShadowRender.
Ground_DemoInit replaced address-style Ground_801C1074 for the wrapper that dispatches StageData->OnDemoInit.
StageData fields use OnInit and OnDemoInit instead of callback0 and callback1.
StageData's first field is internal_stage_id, not flags1.
InternalStageId enum names in this slice are all-caps stage IDs such as TEST, BATTLE, FIGUREGET, HEAL, KINOKOROUTE, and target-test names like TCAPTAIN, TSAMUS, TYOSHI, and TZELDA.
Unknown internal stage IDs remain explicitly marked as InternalStageID_UnkXX rather than being guessed, as seen with InternalStageID_Unk00 and InternalStageID_Unk35.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: For table-driven stage callbacks, identify the semantic name from the StageData field position and callback-table usage rather than from the function body alone.
Replace raw internal stage constants in data tables with enum names only after verifying their ordered position across StageData and mpLib tables.
For grIceMt_801F8A34, matching required not just argument renaming but restoring side effects after Ground_801C4E70: gp->gv.icemt2.xC4 = 0.0f and gp->x11_flags.b012 = 2.
Use HSD_ASSERT where appropriate instead of raw __assert when cleaning existing assert patterns, as shown in grIzumi.
Keep compile-line-sensitive OSReport behavior explicit; this diff used __FILE__ plus hard-coded line numbers for existing reports.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 matched code improved to 56.21% (+0.01%, +212 bytes) with one new match: main/melee/gr/gricemt grIceMt_801F8A34, +35 bytes, from 83.74% to 100.00%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs continuing 'gr cleanup, internal ID fixes/additions' part 2 or subsequent callback-table renames.
Audit remaining StageData initializers for raw numbers or bitmask expressions in the internal_stage_id field.
Search for remaining STAGEKIND_UNK or InternalStageID_Unk values that can be named from mpLib or StageData order.
Check remaining gr*_UnkStage0_OnLoad and gr*_UnkStage0_OnStart symbols for callback-table-derived renames.
Verify route-stage IDs in camera, collision, and mpLib code, especially KINOKOROUTE versus SHRINEROUTE.
